result.stdout:
Samayas.Tools.ProjectsNugetUpdater - Updates NuGet packages in a .NET solution

Usage:
  ProjectsNugetUpdater <solution-directory> [options]
  ProjectsNugetUpdater setup-pat [--source=<name>] [--token=<pat>]

Commands:
  <solution-directory>    Path to the .NET solution directory (default command)
  setup-pat               Configure Personal Access Token for NuGet sources

Arguments:
  <solution-directory>    Required. Path to the .NET solution directory

Options:
  --usegit=<bool>                      Use git operations (default: true)
  --prebuild=<bool>                    Run build before updates (default: true)
  --pretest=<bool>                     Run tests before updates (default: true)
  --postbuild=<bool>                   Run build after updates (default: true)
  --posttest=<bool>                    Run tests after updates (default: true)
  --gitcommit=<bool>                   Commit changes to git (default: true)
  --gitpush=<bool>                     Push changes to remote (default: true)
  --gitbranchname=<name>               Git branch name (default: feature/update-packages)
  --gitbranchcreate=<bool>             Create new git branch (default: true)
  --buildconfiguration=<config>        Build configuration (default: Release)
  --nugetconfigfile=<file>             NuGet config file name (default: nuget.config)
  --filteronprojectfiles=<pattern>     Filter projects (wildcard or semicolon list)
  --excludeprojectfiles=<list>         Exclude projects (semicolon-separated list)
  --excludepackagesforupdate=<string>  Exclude packages from update (semicolon-separated list)
  --includeprerelease=<bool>           Include pre-release versions when selecting latest (default false)

PAT Setup Options:
  --source=<name>                      Source name for PAT configuration
  --token=<pat>                        Personal Access Token

Boolean values: true/false, 1/0, yes/no

Examples:
  Update NuGet packages:
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --usegit=false
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --prebuild=false --pretest=false
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --gitbranchname=feature/update-deps
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --buildconfiguration=Debug
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --excludedpackagesforupdate="Newtonsoft.Json;System.Text.Json"

  Setup PAT:
    ProjectsNugetUpdater setup-pat
    ProjectsNugetUpdater setup-pat --source="Azure DevOps" --token=abc123...

Notes:
  - If git operations are enabled, the directory must be a git repository
  - PAT setup can be run interactively or with command-line parameters
  - Use setup-pat to configure authentication for private NuGet feeds

commands.payload:
Samayas.Tools.ProjectsNugetUpdater - Updates NuGet packages in a .NET solution

Usage:
  ProjectsNugetUpdater <solution-directory> [options]
  ProjectsNugetUpdater setup-pat [--source=<name>] [--token=<pat>]

Commands:
  <solution-directory>    Path to the .NET solution directory (default command)
  setup-pat               Configure Personal Access Token for NuGet sources

Arguments:
  <solution-directory>    Required. Path to the .NET solution directory

Options:
  --usegit=<bool>                      Use git operations (default: true)
  --prebuild=<bool>                    Run build before updates (default: true)
  --pretest=<bool>                     Run tests before updates (default: true)
  --postbuild=<bool>                   Run build after updates (default: true)
  --posttest=<bool>                    Run tests after updates (default: true)
  --gitcommit=<bool>                   Commit changes to git (default: true)
  --gitpush=<bool>                     Push changes to remote (default: true)
  --gitbranchname=<name>               Git branch name (default: feature/update-packages)
  --gitbranchcreate=<bool>             Create new git branch (default: true)
  --buildconfiguration=<config>        Build configuration (default: Release)
  --nugetconfigfile=<file>             NuGet config file name (default: nuget.config)
  --filteronprojectfiles=<pattern>     Filter projects (wildcard or semicolon list)
  --excludeprojectfiles=<list>         Exclude projects (semicolon-separated list)
  --excludepackagesforupdate=<string>  Exclude packages from update (semicolon-separated list)
  --includeprerelease=<bool>           Include pre-release versions when selecting latest (default false)

PAT Setup Options:
  --source=<name>                      Source name for PAT configuration
  --token=<pat>                        Personal Access Token

Boolean values: true/false, 1/0, yes/no

Examples:
  Update NuGet packages:
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --usegit=false
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --prebuild=false --pretest=false
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --gitbranchname=feature/update-deps
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --buildconfiguration=Debug
    ProjectsNugetUpdater C:\Projects\MySolution --excludedpackagesforupdate="Newtonsoft.Json;System.Text.Json"

  Setup PAT:
    ProjectsNugetUpdater setup-pat
    ProjectsNugetUpdater setup-pat --source="Azure DevOps" --token=abc123...

Notes:
  - If git operations are enabled, the directory must be a git repository
  - PAT setup can be run interactively or with command-line parameters
  - Use setup-pat to configure authentication for private NuGet feeds
